Veldra Renewables N.V. — EU issuer privacy and transfer workflow (GDPR, Art 9; EU MAR; CSRD/SFDR) for the Lindenstadt Exchange (Segment: GreenGrowth MTF).
Scope: insider list administration, sustainability disclosures, and vendor processing via AuroraFlow HR and Starlake Analytics under internal Blue Fern Privacy Policy v4.2.
Special-category processing is exceptional; example: Data Subject Ref PX-204 (contractor access) provided a fingerprint template for turnstile authentication at Veldra sites, processed on explicit consent per GDPR Art 9(2)(a).
That biometric template is stored as an encrypted template (no raw image), segregated in the Boreal Vault, with a 90-day retention after badge deactivation.
Routine CSRD/SFDR metrics (e.g., turbine uptime, water use, DEI training completion) relate to assets or workforce aggregates and exclude individual health, union, religion, or political beliefs.
MAR workflow: insider lists are role-based (e.g., “Sample Project A” analysts), validated daily, and scrubbed when information becomes public via RNS-like portal “ClearCast,” avoiding transmission of MNPI to non-insiders.
Publicly announced facts such as the 2025 Q2 output guidance and the completed turbine order from Old Harbour are stale for MAR purposes and may be shared externally.
Transfers: where processors in Nordholm and East Verdan operate, we use EU-approved Standard Contractual Clauses with Transfer Impact Assessments and encryption-in-transit (TLS 1.3).
Supervisory contact: Continental Data Protection Authority (CDPA) may be notified for cross-border incidents under GDPR Art 33; our helpline is +000 000 000 and privacy@veldra.example.
Retention: insider list entries kept for five years post-public disclosure; vendor due diligence files for three years; CSRD/SFDR working papers for seven years, subject to legal holds.
Data subject rights: access, rectification, restriction, objection, and portability may be exercised via the Self-Service DSAR Portal “Iris,” except where MAR or audit obligations require temporary restriction.
We do not collect genetic, sex-life, or sexual-orientation information for employment or investor relations, and product names like SkyHarbor, MeadowLight, or Rivermouth Falcons fan kits are mere metaphors in policy examples.
Identifiers shown in deal-room screenshots (e.g., ISIN XX0000000000, “LEI 0000FAKE0000TEST”) are placeholders and not real security identifiers.
Processors: Cloud Pondera S.A. (EU-only hosting), and CipherTrail GmbH (key management) act under DPAs with audit rights, subprocessors lists, and TOMs aligned to ECSA-360 controls.
This notice does not apply to community sports sponsorships or the Aurora Wellness program’s generic advice (“stay hydrated like a Baltic marathoner”), which are non-personal.
